sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT * 
FROM @{item().tableName} 
WHERE @{item().WaterMark_Column} > '@{formatDateTime(activity('Lookup Old WaterMark Column').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue, 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss')}'
  AND @{item().WaterMark_Column} <= '@{formatDateTime(activity('Lookup NewWaterMark Column').output.firstRow.NewWaterMarkValue, 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss')}'

source.sqlReaderQuery: select * from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES where TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE';

SELECT  TOP 1 TableName,MaxUpdate
FROM (
    SELECT 'COSTLIST' AS TableName, MAX(LASTUPDATED_LastModified) AS MaxUpdate FROM silver.COSTLIST
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'INVOICELINEITEM' AS TableName, MAX(LASTUPDATED_LastModified) AS MaxUpdate FROM silver.INVOICE_LINE_ITEM
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PRODUCINGSTTS' AS TableName, MAX(LASTUPDATED_LastModified) AS MaxUpdate FROM silver.PRODUCING_STAT_RATIO_DETAIL
) AS Combined
ORDER BY MaxUpdate DESC;
